states.name: Delhi
states.description: Capital City with Premier Medical Institutes

colleges.name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS)
colleges.admissionProcess: AIIMS New Delhi admission is solely through NEET UG. Candidates must qualify the NEET cutoff and appear for MCC counseling. The institute is known for its rigorous academic standards and world-class clinical training.
colleges.placements: AIIMS Delhi graduates secure the highest medical packages in India. According to NIRF 2025, the median package for PG students (MD/MS) is ₹34 LPA, while UG graduates receive around ₹16 LPA. The internship stipend is among the highest at ₹26,300 per month.

detailedFees.otherFees: Registration & Examination fees as per university norms

colleges.name: Maulana Azad Medical College (MAMC)
colleges.admissionProcess: The admission process for MBBS is based on the NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) UG score. Candidates must participate in the counseling process conducted by MCC for All India Quota and respective state authorities for State Quota seats.
colleges.placements: Maulana Azad Medical College (MAMC) has a near 100% placement rate for its graduates. The average package ranges from ₹10 LPA to ₹15 LPA, with top clinical specialties attracting packages up to ₹25 LPA. Internship stipends are approximately ₹25,000 per month.

detailedFees.otherFees: Registration & Examination fees as per university norms

colleges.name: Lady Hardinge Medical College (LHMC)
colleges.admissionProcess: The admission process for MBBS is based on the NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) UG score. Candidates must participate in the counseling process conducted by MCC for All India Quota and respective state authorities for State Quota seats.
colleges.placements: Excellent clinical exposure and internship opportunities in associated hospitals. Graduates often pursue MD/MS in top institutes or join premier health organizations.

detailedFees.otherFees: Registration & Examination fees as per university norms
